heroSubheadline: Fast, honest, and reliable plumbing repairs and installations — available 24/7 for emergencies.
aboutSection:
For over 15 years, Summit Plumbing has kept Austin homes and businesses flowing. What started as a one-truck operation is now the area's most-called name for dependable plumbing.

Our licensed, insured technicians show up on time, explain the problem in plain English, and fix it right the first time — no surprises on the invoice.

From a leaky faucet to a full repipe, we treat your home like our own and stand behind every job with a satisfaction guarantee.

services.name: Emergency Repairs
services.description: 24/7 rapid response for burst pipes, major leaks, and clogs.

services.name: Water Heater Service
services.description: Tank and tankless water heater installation and repair.

services.name: Drain & Sewer Cleaning
services.description: Professional drain clearing and sewer line hydro-jetting.

services.name: Fixture Installation
services.description: Faucets, toilets, and fixtures installed to code.

services.name: Leak Detection
services.description: Non-invasive detection to find and stop hidden leaks.

services.name: Whole-Home Repiping
services.description: Durable repiping with quality copper or PEX materials.

testimonials.text: They fixed our burst pipe within an hour of calling. Absolute lifesavers.
testimonials.author: Maria G.

testimonials.text: Honest pricing and clean, careful work. Highly recommend these folks.
testimonials.author: James T.

testimonials.text: Professional, on time, and tidied up before leaving. Will call again.
testimonials.author: Priya N.

ctaText: Call Now for a Free Quote
metaTitle: Summit Plumbing Co. — Plumbers in Austin, TX
metaDescription: Trusted 24/7 plumbing repairs and installations in Austin, TX. Licensed, insured, fair pricing. Call now for a free quote.
